en: So if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort from love, any participation in the Spirit, any affection and sympathy,
zh: 所以，你們在基督裡若有甚麼鼓勵，有甚麼愛心的安慰，有甚麼靈裡的契通，有甚麼慈悲和憐憫，

en: complete my joy by being of the same mind, having the same love, being in full accord and of one mind.
zh: 就應當有同樣的思想，同樣的愛心，要心志相同，思想一致，使我充滿喜樂。

en: Do nothing from rivalry or conceit, but in humility count others more significant than yourselves.
zh: 不要自私自利，也不要貪圖虛榮，只要謙卑，看別人比自己強；

en: Let each of you look not only to his own interests, but also to the interests of others.
zh: 各人不要單顧自己的事，也要顧別人的事。

en: Have this mind among yourselves, which is yours in Christ Jesus,
zh: 你們應當有這樣的思想，這也是基督耶穌的思想。

en: who, though he was in the form of God, did not count equality with God a thing to be grasped,
zh: 他本來有 神的形象，卻不堅持自己與 神平等的地位，

en: but made himself nothing, taking the form of a servant, being born in the likeness of men. And being found in human form,
zh: 反而倒空自己，取了奴僕的形象，成為人的樣式；

en: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
zh: 既然有人的樣子，就自甘卑微，順服至死，而且死在十字架上。

en: Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name,
zh: 因此 神把他升為至高，並且賜給他超過萬名之上的名。

en: so that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, in heaven and on earth and under the earth,
zh: 使天上、地上和地底下的一切，因著耶穌的名，都要屈膝，

en: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
zh: 並且口裡承認耶穌基督為主，使榮耀歸給父 神。

en: Therefore, my beloved, as you have always obeyed, so now, not only as in my presence but much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling,
zh: 這樣看來，我所親愛的，你們素來是順服的， 就應當恐懼戰兢地作成自己的救恩。

en: for it is God who works in you, both to will and to work for his good pleasure.
zh: 神為了成全自己的美意，就在你們裡面動工，使你們可以立志和行事。

en: Do all things without grumbling or questioning,
zh: 無論作甚麼，都不要發怨言、起爭論，

en: that you may be blameless and innocent, children of God without blemish in the midst of a crooked and twisted generation, among whom you shine as lights in the world,
zh: 好使你們無可指摘、純真無邪，在這彎曲乖謬的世代中，作 神沒有瑕疵的兒女；你們要在這世代中發光，好像天上的光體一樣，

en: holding fast to the word of life, so that in the day of Christ I may be proud that I did not run in vain or labor in vain.
zh: 把生命的道顯揚出來，使我在基督的日子可以誇耀我沒有空跑，也沒有徒勞。

en: Even if I am to be poured out as a drink offering upon the sacrificial offering of your faith, I am glad and rejoice with you all.
zh: 即使把我澆奠在你們信心的祭物和供奉上，我也喜樂，並且和你們大家一同喜樂。

en: Likewise you also should be glad and rejoice with me.
zh: 照樣，你們也要喜樂，並且要和我一同喜樂。

en: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon, so that I too may be cheered by news of you.
zh: 我靠著主耶穌，希望不久就會差提摩太到你們那裡去，使我們知道你們的情況，可以得到鼓勵。

en: For I have no one like him, who will be genuinely concerned for your welfare.
zh: 沒有人與我同心，真正關心你們的事，

en: They all seek their own interests, not those of Jesus Christ.
zh: 因為大家只顧自己的事，而不理耶穌基督的事。

en: But you know Timothy's proven worth, how as a son with a father he has served with me in the gospel.
zh: 不過，你們知道提摩太已證明了他的為人，他和我一同為了福音服事主，就像兒子跟父親一樣。

en: I hope therefore to send him just as soon as I see how it will go with me,
zh: 所以，等我看出自己的事會怎樣了結之後，我希望立刻差他去；

en: and I trust in the Lord that shortly I myself will come also.
zh: 而且靠著主，我相信自己不久也會去。

en: I have thought it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus my brother and fellow worker and fellow soldier, and your messenger and minister to my need,
zh: 然而我認為必須差以巴弗提到你們那裡去，他是我的弟兄，與我一同作工一同作戰的，也是你們為我的需要差來服事我的。

en: for he has been longing for you all and has been distressed because you heard that he was ill.
zh: 他一直在想念你們眾人，並且因為你們聽見他病了，他就非常難過。

en: Indeed he was ill, near to death. But God had mercy on him, and not only on him but on me also, lest I should have sorrow upon sorrow.
zh: 事實上他病得幾乎要死，然而 神憐憫了他；不但憐憫他，也憐憫我，免得我憂上加憂。

en: I am the more eager to send him, therefore, that you may rejoice at seeing him again, and that I may be less anxious.
zh: 所以，我更急著差他去，讓你們再見到他，就可以喜樂，也可以減少我的掛慮。

en: So receive him in the Lord with all joy, and honor such men,
zh: 因此，你們要在主裡歡歡喜喜地接待他，也要尊重這樣的人，

en: for he nearly died for the work of Christ, risking his life to complete what was lacking in your service to me.
zh: 因他為了基督的工作，冒著生命的危險，差一點喪了命，為的是要補滿你們服事我不足的地方。
